applications.name: HRMS Company
applications.description: Human resource management for employees records and postings

applications.name: Leave Management System
applications.description: Online leave application and approval system for employees

applications.name: Travel Concession System
applications.description: LTC and travel concession claims for employees and families

applications.name: SSO Gateway
applications.description: Single sign-on authentication gateway for all Company applications

applications.name: Pay and Allowances Portal
applications.description: Salary slip, arrears and allowance management for employees

applications.name: Medical Records System
applications.description: employees medical history and fitness category records

applications.name: Training Management System
applications.description: Course nominations, training records and promotion exam results

application_purposes.purpose_text: I need to access the corporate intranet network for official communication.
Looking up office-wide announcements and internal documents.
I want to update my personnel records, posting preferences, or check my service details.
Need to view my current posting order and promotion history.
I need to apply for annual leave, casual leave, or sick leave.
Checking my remaining holiday balance for this year.
I want to claim travel allowance for my recent official duty trip.
Applying for LTC (Leave Travel Concession) for my family vacation.
Managing my passwords, two-factor authentication, and login credentials.
Unlocking my account so I can log into other corporate applications.
I need to download my monthly salary slip or check my DA arrears.
Checking if my transport allowance has been credited to my account.
I need to update my annual medical fitness category.
Viewing the medical board results and Health Assessment forms.
Applying for upcoming professional corporate training courses.
Checking the results of my recent promotion exams.

application_symptoms.symptom_text: Corporate Intranet portal not loading on office computer
Unable to access intranet from office terminal
Corporate Intranet login page giving error after password entry
Service record not updating after promotion
Posting order not reflecting in HRMS
Personal details showing wrong department in system
Leave application submitted but not showing to Manager
Annual leave balance incorrect in system
Casual leave not getting approved online
LTC claim submitted but status not updating
Travel advance request not processing
Family travel concession form not available
Getting logged out automatically from all applications
SSO password reset not working
Two factor authentication OTP not receiving
Salary slip not generated for current month
DA arrears not reflecting in pay portal
Wrong rank pay showing in salary statement
Medical fitness category not updated after review
Health Assessment medical form not accessible online
Course nomination not appearing in training portal
Promotion exam result not visible in system

classification_configs.label: login/access
classification_configs.description: The user is unable to log in, authenticate, or access their account.

classification_configs.label: performance/slow
classification_configs.description: The application is running very slowly, timing out, or lagging.

classification_configs.label: data error
classification_configs.description: There is an error with the data, incorrect information, or a synchronization issue.

classification_configs.label: total outage
classification_configs.description: The entire application is completely down and unreachable for everyone.

classification_configs.label: partial/degraded
classification_configs.description: Some features of the application are broken, but it is partially working.

classification_configs.label: cosmetic/UI
classification_configs.description: There is a visual issue, spelling mistake, or the user interface looks wrong.

classification_configs.label: other
classification_configs.description: The issue does not fit any specific category.

classification_configs.label: critical
classification_configs.description: This is a critical emergency affecting the entire base or mission-critical systems.

classification_configs.label: high
classification_configs.description: This is a high priority issue affecting many users or an important workflow.

classification_configs.label: normal
classification_configs.description: This is a normal, routine helpdesk request affecting a single user.

classification_configs.label: low
classification_configs.description: This is a low priority request, such as a minor question or cosmetic issue.
